allow: PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{n='CPU\(s\)';e={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\nodeprocs.txt" -Encoding utf8 -Width 500; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\nodeprocs.txt")

PowerShell(try { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3939 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop; $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "stopped PID $_" } } catch { "no listener on 3939 \(already stopped\)" })
